purpose: Price validation slice v2 — 5 PPE SKU with higher expected admissible source coverage

scout_findings.note: Product discontinued but last-known public price visible. honeywellstore.com classified as official tier. Price signal valid as floor/reference. USD→RUB normalized cleanly.

scout_findings.scout_notes: lsgindustrial.com (price $36.14 in search snippet) returned 404. indiamart.com found (India market, not admissible for RUB pipeline). fischerbell.com Singapore — admissibility unclear. No confirmed accessible EU/US price page.

Honeywell support article confirms PN is EU helmet-adapter variant (adapters 3711/3712/3721). US variant 1011993 found on multiple US distributors, but EU-specific 1012541 has no standalone price page. hazmasters.com returned 404.

PN 121679-L3 does not match BW/GasAlert aspirator PN patterns (MC-AS01, D4-AS01, B86MCAS01). Likely a regional or variant catalog number not indexed by standard distributors. Requires specialist BW Technologies/Honeywell Analytics distributor lookup.

GasAlert connectivity kits found at instrumart.com and pksafety.com but under different PN patterns (GA-USB1-IR, MC-CK-DL). 129625-L3 specific PN not matched. Instrumart has related kits — manual lookup with PN required.

edge_cases.fx_locale: No new FX edge cases. USD normalized cleanly. No TWD or exotic-currency exposure in this slice.
edge_cases.discontinued_price: 1011994 is DISCONTINUED on honeywellstore.com. Script classified it as public_price with tier=official and review_required=False. This is correct: the price is a valid reference signal even if inactive stock. No special handling needed in pipeline.
edge_cases.eu_variant_gap: 1012541 EU variant is a systematic gap: EU helmet adapters ship as separate regional SKU with no standalone distributor page. Needs specialist Honeywell PPE EU distributor (e.g. uvex-safety.com, protectaplugs.co.uk) in future slice.
